title: Determination of Non-Daylighted Area
full_text:
4.3.3.4 Determination of Non-Daylighted Area
Determination of Non-Daylighted Area
1) The non-daylighted area of a space, ANDL,i, in m2, shall be identical to that for
the proposed building as determined in Article 4.3.2.4.

sentences.text: The non-daylighted area of a space, ANDL,i, in m2, shall be identical to that for the proposed building as determined in Article 4.3.2.4.
